features: This extra comfort pair of footwear insoles are specially designed to help keep your footwear for longer. The long lasting fibrabond top layer provides extra comfort along with the shock absorbing bottom foam layer.
The one size fits all design are easy to cut to size and are suitable for both men and women. Simply cut along the guided measurement lines on the reverse of the insole.
Ideal for use in shoes, boots, slippers and most other footwear will ensure you can keep your feet warm inside or outside your home.
description: Product Description Extra Comfort Foam Shoe Insoles 1 Pair Unisex Insoles for Shoes Boots Trainers Indications Cushioning, Shock Absorption, Flat Feet Support Directions 1. Remove the insoles from their packaging. 2. If necessary, cut the insoles along the guided measurement lines on the reverse of the insole to fit your foot size. 3. Place the insoles inside your shoes, boots, slippers, or other footwear. 4. Ensure a comfortable fit and enjoy the extra comfort and shock absorption provided by the insoles. Safety Warning Consult a healthcare professional before use, especially if you have flat feet or any foot conditions. See more
